updates.title: Free Tax Filing Support for Foster Youth
updates.description: Free tax filing support for current and former foster youth. Find credits you qualify for, connect with free tax prep, and get walk-through help from our team.

updates.title: Resource Finder: 500,000+ Programs at Your Fingertips
updates.description: Search for housing, food, healthcare, jobs, education, legal help, and more by ZIP code. Includes community-recommended resources vetted by foster youth.

updates.title: 2025 Impact Report: No One Should Navigate Life Alone
updates.description: 2,147 community members, 62 events hosted, 178 individuals supported through resource navigation. See how our community made an impact together in 2025.

updates.title: Storyteller Collective Guide
updates.description: Written entirely by people with lived experience in foster care, this 60+ page resource transforms storytelling from an act of vulnerability into a tool for empowerment.

updates.title: Donate to FG's Crisis Fund
updates.description: Your donation provides emergency assistance to those impacted by foster care in our community when they need it most—quickly and directly.
